description_long: This lamp features a spherical woven rattan or wicker shade with a large circular opening on one side, supported by a minimalist metal tripod stand. The woven texture of the shade gives it a natural, handcrafted appearance, while the open section reveals a white inner diffuser or bulb housing. A visible power cord extends from the rear of the lamp, suggesting it is electrically powered. The stand is slender and metallic, providing stability while maintaining a light, airy aesthetic. The overall design blends organic materials with modern, functional lines, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A spherical woven rattan lamp with a large open section, set on a slim metal tripod stand and featuring a visible power cord.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large circular opening in the woven shade and the white inner diffuser.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the closed woven surface and the power cord emerging from the back.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the rounded woven texture and the cord extending to the left.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the open section and the white inner component inside the shade.
